project_context.primary_goal: High-conversion marketing site conveying premium quality, durability, and security, moving away from generic templates.

hierarchy.overline: text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-semibold text-[#f9a03f]

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#ff7a00] to-[#f9a03f] text-white font-bold rounded-lg shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(255,122,0,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(255,122,0,0.23)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-200

spacing_and_layout.general: Use generous padding (p-12, p-20) to create a premium, uncrowded feel.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Tetris Mode (Mode A) for the Services section. Asymmetrical layouts with 8 to 12 column structures.

design_system.icons: lucide-react for UI icons. Use structural, clean lines.

images.description: Cinematic dark architectural fence render with orange glow.

page_sections.name: Hero Section
features: Left Column: Powerful H1 ('We Don't Just Build Fences. We Build Security.'), Subtitle, Trust Badges (5-Star, 10+ Years Exp).
Right Column: 'Get My Quote' Glassmorphism Card.

CRITICAL BEHAVIOR: Progressive capture form. The moment user enters Email or Phone, automatically trigger API/Backend to send email to allbestfencing@gmail.com and log to Google Sheet. Do not wait for a full submit for these fields.

page_sections.name: Why Choose Us / Trust Badges
features: Highlights: Licensed & Insured, 10+ Years Experience, 5-Star Rated, Local Vancouver Experts

page_sections.name: Services Grid
features: Items: Wood Fencing, Aluminum Fences, Privacy/Security Fencing, Custom Gates & Automation, Chain Link, Vinyl.
Each card features image overlay, dark gradient at bottom, and a subtle glowing tracing beam on hover.

page_sections.name: Service Area Marquee
features: List all 13 cities within 30 miles of Surrey/Vancouver BC.
Use font-serif or elegant mono, low contrast text.

page_sections.name: Portfolio & Gallery
features: Focus on premium dark imagery and tight gaps (gap-2).

page_sections.name: Testimonials
features: Quote text in serif or large italic display font

page_sections.name: Floating Action Buttons
features: Two circular buttons: WhatsApp Icon and Phone Icon.

page_sections.name: Footer
features: Big Type: 'ALL BEST FENCING' at text-[8vw].
Columns for Services, Service Areas, Contact Info.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme 'Jewel & Luxury' archetype using the specified Navy and Orange palette.
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto. Use Clash Display or similar structural fonts for Headings, and Outfit/Satoshi for body.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.

For the 'Get My Quote' form, implement the progressive capture logic. Hook up an onChange or onBlur event on the email/phone fields that immediately triggers the backend function to send the data to allbestfencing@gmail.com and the Google Sheet, without requiring a complete form submission. Ensure you mock this backend integration if real APIs aren't present.
Build the Floating WhatsApp & Phone buttons as sticky elements with z-index 50, fixed to the bottom right of the screen.
Ensure images never exceed 80vh on mobile to prevent blocking content.
Use framer-motion for micro-interactions, like the tracing beam on service cards and staggered fade-ins for the grid.
